title: Companion — Photo Plates
medium: eight generated photographs (ComfyUI / RealVisXL V5.0) serving as field-guide plates for the walk's invented civic glossary. arm-height waterline; edicola decay; cow-path lamp; fabric tell; kerb privilege; nightly blank page; palimpsest floor; transaction-spillover lighting.
caption: Not photographs of the walk — photographs of what the walk conjured. Each plate stands in for an entry whose proper habitat is a street at dusk.
